name: conviction
description: Non-custodial bounded prediction-market execution for OKX.AI

scripts.typecheck: node --check src/*.mjs && node --check scripts/*.mjs && node --check api/*.js && node --check test/*.test.mjs && python3 -m py_compile scripts/conviction_fast_responder.py scripts/conviction_review_watch.py scripts/state-release-mutex.py scripts/telegram_outbox.py
scripts.gate: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run site:verify && npm run agent:verify && npm run acceptance:gate-a -- --offline && npm run acceptance:gate-b -- --offline && npm run acceptance:gate-c -- --offline
